subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: Yes, yes, of course I do. In all questions which concern the welfare of a nation, is not the woman's view as important as the man's
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @role and station of women, @past, present and future of Iran, @Tahirih [Qurratu'l-'Ayn], @martyrs and martyrdom
